metadata.description: Per-project index, decisions log, state dashboard, and live context-awareness that Claude maintains across sessions. Reconciles against git log at session start. Warns at context thresholds and offers a unified /handoff to save state before compaction.

plugins.name: project-scribe
plugins.description: Per-project STATE.md + DECISIONS.md + status memos. /scribe dashboard readout. Auto-reconciles against git log at session start. Live context-awareness warns at 30/40% and offers /handoff to save state before compaction.
